item.title: Israeli ground incursion into Lebanon as front boils over amid wider war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Hezbollah says Israel wanted open war, 'so let it be an open war', adding that 'the era of patience has ended.'
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: Iran mourns 165 girls, staff killed in school strike during US-Israel war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Attack in southern Iran that hit civilians was the deadliest of the US-Israeli war against Tehran so far.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: How Russia could benefit from the US-Israeli war on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
A protracted conflict in the Middle East could help Russia's war effort in Ukraine.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: US claims destroyed IRGC command centre, more Israel attacks on Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
The US Central Command (CENTCOM) says it destroyed air defence installations as well as missile and drone launch sites.
Matched: ai(+3), launch(+2)

item.title: US sanctions Rwandan army and top officials for supporting M23 in DRC
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Kinshasa welcomed the sanctions while Kigali said the US move 'unjustly' targets Rwanda.
Matched: sanctions(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: As bombing continues, Israel’s war aim in Iran becomes clear: Regime change
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Israel aims for regime change in Iran, but may not care as much about whether the transition is smooth.
Matched: war(+3), ai(+3)

item.title: Nepal’s Gen Z threw out old parties. Will it vote for them in key election?
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Last year's protests reflected popular disenchantment with established political parties, which are again seeking power.
Matched: election(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: UAE resumes limited flights amid travel chaos across Middle East
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Dubai's airport authority says it authorised a limited number of flights as hundreds of thousands remain stranded.
Matched: economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: Shutdown of Hormuz Strait raises fears of soaring oil prices
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Consumers are set to pay higher prices, but US producers could benefit, analysts say.
Matched: economy(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: US Embassy in Riyadh, Omani port hit by drones; US base in Bahrain targeted
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Saudi Defence Ministry says a fire broke out at the embassy, while media reported a drone attack on Oman's Duqm port.
Matched: ministry(+2), ai(+3)

item.title: India, Europe feel fuel crunch as Gulf gas supplies disrupted amid war
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
India and Europe bear the brunt of soaring prices as Qatar halts its liquefied natural gas production.
Matched: war(+3)

item.title: The aftermath of ongoing Israeli and US strikes on Iran’s capital, Tehran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US-Israeli strikes on Iran kill almost 800 people as blasts hit Tehran and other cities over four days of war.
Matched: war(+3)

item.title: Iran holds mass funeral for girls, staff killed in US-Israel school attack
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Thousands gather in Minab for a mass funeral, chanting against the US and Israel after the school bombing.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Video: Top Democrat says there was no imminent threat to the US from Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
US Democratic senator Mark Warner says there was no “imminent threat” from Iran to the US.
Matched: war(+3)

item.title: Real Madrid defeated by Getafe to fall four points behind Barca in La Liga
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Satriano's superb volley gives the visitors a 1-0 win at the Santiago Bernabeu as Real miss injured forward Mbappe.
Matched: war(+3)

item.title: What we know on day four of US-Israeli attacks on Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Washington says 'harder hits' are still to come, as Tehran retaliates by closing the Strait of Hormuz.
Matched: ai(+3)

item.title: Israeli strikes in Beirut as Hezbollah launches drones at Israel
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Clouds of smoke rose over Beirut’s southern suburbs as Israel escalated its bombardment of the Lebanese capital.
Matched: launch(+2)

item.title: Asia’s stock markets plunge amid US-Israeli conflict with Iran
item.description:
Source: Al Jazeera (Global)
Asian stocks rack up steep losses after Wall Street shrugs off risks of widening conflict.
Matched: economy(+2)
